title: Seed history, commit and restart worker

log.context: Seed history, commit and restart worker

All three steps succeeded:

1. **word_history.json written** — seeded with `sopesar`, `ternura` (Spanish) and `山水`, `画龙点睛` (Mandarin) at `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/word_history.json`.

2. **Committed and pushed** — commit `efee754` on `master`, both `activities/word_activity.py` (39 insertions, 7 deletions) and `word_history.json` (new file) included, pushed to GitHub successfully.

3. **temporal-worker.service restarted** — status is `active`.
